extract: The Full Heal (Japanese: なんでもなおし Heal-All) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation I. It can be used to cure a Pokémon of all non-volatile status conditions and confusion. It is an improved counterpart of the Antidote, Paralyze Heal, Burn Heal, Ice Heal, and Awakening, combining their effects into one. It has an improved counterpart in Full Restore. In early appearances, the Full Heal was depicted as a vaccine inside of a syringe-type device; this was later changed to being a "spray-type medicine" in Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen.
